title: Process of Mapping a Conceptual ER Model to a Logical Relational Model
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step process of transforming an Entity-Relationship conceptual design into a normalized relational database schema.
relationships: 1:1 Relationships merge into a table or create foreign keys
1:M Relationships add a foreign key to the 'many' side table
M:N Relationships become a new junction table with foreign keys
Composite attributes are broken down into simple columns
